requirement_topic.en: Grid Connection Requirements for BESS Power Conversion System (PCS / Storage Inverter)
requirement_topic.zh: 储能系统并网要求（储能变流器/PCS侧）
requirement_topic.zht: 儲能系統並網要求（儲能變流器／PCS側）

summary.en: BESS storage inverters (PCS) connecting to EU grids must comply with EN 50549-1 (low voltage, ≤16 A/phase) or EN 50549-2 (medium voltage), which specify requirements for generating plants up to 75 kVA and above connected in parallel with the public distribution network, including voltage/frequency ride-through, reactive power capability, anti-islanding, and reconnection limits. Additionally, national grid codes apply depending on the member state. In Czechia, the transmission system operator is ČEPS (Českomoravská elektroenergetická přenosová soustava) and distribution system operators include ČEZ Distribuce, E.ON Distribuce, and PREdistribuce. Czechia implements EU Regulation 2016/631 (RfG) and ČEPS/DSO publish technical connection conditions (Pravidla provozování přenosové soustavy / Pravidla provozování distribuční soustavy) that must be satisfied for BESS grid connection. Commission Regulation (EU) 2016/631 (RfG) sets binding requirements for power-generating modules above the national thresholds, covering fault ride-through, frequency response, and reactive power exchange.
summary.zh: 接入欧盟电网的储能变流器（PCS）须符合EN 50549-1（低压，≤16 A/相）或EN 50549-2（中压）标准，规定了并联接入公共配电网的发电装置（≤75 kVA及以上）的电压/频率穿越、无功功率能力、孤岛保护及重新并网要求。此外须遵守各成员国国家电网规程。在捷克，输电系统运营商为ČEPS（Českomoravská elektroenergetická přenosová soustava），配电系统运营商包括ČEZ Distribuce、E.ON Distribuce及PREdistribuce。捷克实施欧盟法规2016/631（RfG），ČEPS/DSO发布的技术接入条件（Pravidla provozování přenosové soustavy / Pravidla provozování distribuční soustavy）须在BESS并网前满足。欧盟委员会法规（EU）2016/631（RfG）对超过国家阈值的发电模块设定了具有约束力的故障穿越、频率响应和无功功率交换要求。
summary.zht: 接入歐盟電網的儲能變流器（PCS）須符合EN 50549-1（低壓，≤16 A/相）或EN 50549-2（中壓）標準，規定了並聯接入公共配電網的發電裝置（≤75 kVA及以上）的電壓／頻率穿越、無功功率能力、孤島保護及重新並網要求。此外須遵守各成員國國家電網規程。在捷克，輸電系統運營商為ČEPS（Českomoravská elektroenergetická přenosová soustava），配電系統運營商包括ČEZ Distribuce、E.ON Distribuce及PREdistribuce。捷克實施歐盟法規2016/631（RfG），ČEPS/DSO發布的技術接入條件（Pravidla provozování přenosové soustavy / Pravidla provozování distribuční soustavy）須在BESS併網前滿足。歐盟委員會法規（EU）2016/631（RfG）對超過國家閾值的發電模組設定了具有約束力的故障穿越、頻率響應和無功功率交換要求。

standards_or_laws: ČEPS Pravidla provozování přenosové soustavy (transmission system operation rules)
ČEZ Distribuce / E.ON Distribuce / PREdistribuce — Pravidla provozování distribuční soustavy (distribution system operation rules)

summary.en: In China, grid-connected storage inverters (PCS) are governed primarily by GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Requirements for Power Conversion System of Electrochemical Energy Storage System), which superseded GB/T 34120-2017. The 2023 revision extended the AC output voltage upper limit to 35 kV, added fault ride-through (LVRT/HVRT) and primary frequency response requirements, and updated product classification. GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Power Station Connected to Power System) is sometimes referenced for inverter grid-connection behaviour. The National Energy Administration (NEA) and grid companies (State Grid / Southern Grid) also issue enterprise standards (Q/GDW series) for energy storage grid connection.
summary.zh: 中国并网储能变流器（PCS）主要依据GB/T 34120-2023《电化学储能系统储能变流器技术要求》（取代GB/T 34120-2017），规定了PCS的电气性能、并网保护、孤岛检测及通信接口要求。2023年修订版将交流输出电压上限提高至35 kV，增加了故障穿越（LVRT/HVRT）和一次调频要求，并更新了产品分类。GB/T 19964-2024《光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定》有时也被参考用于逆变器并网行为。国家能源局及电网企业（国家电网/南方电网）还发布Q/GDW系列企业标准用于储能并网。
summary.zht: 中國並網儲能變流器（PCS）主要依據GB/T 34120-2023《電化學儲能系統儲能變流器技術要求》（取代GB/T 34120-2017），規定了PCS的電氣性能、並網保護、孤島檢測及通信接口要求。2023年修訂版將交流輸出電壓上限提高至35 kV，增加了故障穿越（LVRT/HVRT）和一次調頻要求，並更新了產品分類。GB/T 19964-2024《光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定》有時亦被參考用於逆變器並網行為。國家能源局及電網企業（國家電網／南方電網）還發布Q/GDW系列企業標準用於儲能並網。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34120-2023 — Technical Requirements for Power Conversion System of Electrochemical Energy Storage System (SAMR/SAC; supersedes GB/T 34120-2017; recommended national standard)
Q/GDW 1564-2014 (State Grid enterprise standard — current supersession status not publicly confirmable; verify with State Grid or SAC for any post-2020 revision)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 34120 is not accepted as equivalent to EN 50549-1/-2 or Czech ČEPS/DSO technical connection conditions for Czechia market access. PCS units exported from China must be re-tested and re-certified to EN 50549-1 or EN 50549-2 by a recognised test laboratory, and must satisfy the applicable ČEPS/DSO connection rules. The EU RfG Regulation (2016/631) is directly applicable law in EU member states including Czechia; Chinese type-test reports against GB/T 34120 are not substitutable. Key technical gaps include different voltage/frequency ride-through profiles, reactive power Q(U) curves, reconnection delay settings, and communication protocol requirements (IEC 61850 vs. Chinese Modbus/CAN conventions).
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 34120不被捷克市场准入接受为EN 50549-1/-2或捷克ČEPS/DSO技术接入条件的等效标准。从中国出口的储能变流器须经认可检测实验室重新测试并取得EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2认证，并须满足ČEPS/DSO的接入规则。欧盟法规（EU）2016/631在包括捷克在内的欧盟成员国具有直接法律效力，依据GB/T 34120出具的中国型式试验报告不可替代。主要技术差距包括：电压/频率穿越曲线不同、无功功率Q(U)曲线不同、重新并网延迟设置不同，以及通信协议要求不同（IEC 61850对比中国Modbus/CAN惯例）。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 34120不被捷克市場準入接受為EN 50549-1/-2或捷克ČEPS/DSO技術接入條件的等效標準。從中國出口的儲能變流器須經認可檢測實驗室重新測試並取得EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2認證，並須滿足ČEPS/DSO的接入規則。歐盟法規（EU）2016/631在包括捷克在內的歐盟成員國具有直接法律效力，依據GB/T 34120出具的中國型式試驗報告不可替代。主要技術差距包括：電壓／頻率穿越曲線不同、無功功率Q(U)曲線不同、重新並網延遲設置不同，以及通訊協議要求不同（IEC 61850對比中國Modbus/CAN慣例）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EN 50549-1/-2 are harmonised standards supporting the Low Voltage Directive / relevant national grid codes; EU RfG 2016/631 is directly binding EU law. Czech ČEPS and DSO connection rules are mandatory for grid connection approval in Czechia.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for grid connection in China — GB/T 34120-2023 is a recommended national standard (推荐性国标) but compliance is effectively required by State Grid / Southern Grid connection rules. The recommended classification has not changed in the 2023 edition.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese PCS / storage inverters certified only to GB/T 34120 are NOT compliant for EU grid connection in Czechia. Full re-testing to EN 50549-1 or EN 50549-2 and satisfaction of ČEPS/DSO technical connection conditions is required before connecting to the Czech grid. Engage an accredited EU test laboratory and consult ČEPS or the relevant DSO early in the project development cycle.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅依据GB/T 34120认证的中国储能变流器不符合捷克欧盟并网要求。在接入捷克电网之前，须完成EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2的完整重新测试，并满足ČEPS/DSO技术接入条件。建议在项目开发周期早期联系经认可的欧盟检测实验室，并咨询ČEPS或相关DSO。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅依據GB/T 34120認證的中國儲能變流器不符合捷克歐盟並網要求。在接入捷克電網之前，須完成EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2的完整重新測試，並滿足ČEPS/DSO技術接入條件。建議在項目開發週期早期聯繫經認可的歐盟檢測實驗室，並諮詢ČEPS或相關DSO。
